description: Criminal organization originating from Maicao, Colombia, operating in the Guajira Peninsula across the Colombia-Venezuela border. Specializes in contraband of gasoline, weapons, minerals, stolen cars, cattle, and drug trafficking, as well as robbery, extortion, assassination, kidnapping, and usury. Processes drugs in Colombian departments and exports via Venezuela to the Caribbean, United States, and Europe. Has ties to the Cartel of the Suns.

country_links.evidence_quote: exported to other Caribbean islands such as the Dominican Republic and Haiti, bound for the United States and Europe.
country_links.context: The cartel exports drugs to the Dominican Republic as part of its trafficking route.

country_links.evidence_quote: Its base territory is the city of Maracaibo and a large part of the state of Zulia in Venezuela
country_links.context: The cartel has its base territory in Maracaibo and a large part of Zulia state, and transports drugs through Venezuela.
